# License — Tilder Brand Assets

Copyright (c) 2026 EvolvBits. All rights reserved.

This folder contains the official logotype, logo variations, and brand assets of **Tilder**,
a project maintained by [EvolvBits](https://github.com/evolvbits).

These assets are the **exclusive property of EvolvBits** and are **not open source**.
They are not covered by the Elastic License 2.0 that governs the Tilder source code.

---

## What is permitted

You MAY use the Tilder logotype solely for **referential purposes**, such as:

- Writing articles, blog posts, or documentation that mention or describe Tilder
- Giving talks or presentations that reference Tilder as a tool
- Linking to the official Tilder repository using the logo as a visual reference

All referential use must:

- Use the logo **unmodified** — no changes to colors, proportions, typography, or layout
- Make it **clear that Tilder and its logo are property of EvolvBits**
- Not imply any endorsement, partnership, or affiliation with EvolvBits

---

## What is prohibited

You MAY NOT, without prior written permission from EvolvBits:

- Use the Tilder logotype or any brand asset in another project, product, or software
- Modify, adapt, crop, recolor, or create derivative works based on the logo
- Use the logo in any commercial material, advertisement, or promotional content
- Redistribute or sublicense the logo files in any form
- Use the logo in a way that could cause confusion about the origin of a product or service
- Register or attempt to register the Tilder logo or any confusingly similar mark as a trademark

---

## Requesting permission

If you wish to use the Tilder logotype outside of the permitted cases above,
please open an issue at [github.com/evolvbits/tilder](https://github.com/evolvbits/tilder)
with the label `brand-request`, describing your intended use.

EvolvBits reserves the right to grant or deny permission at its sole discretion.

---

## Enforcement

Unauthorized use of the Tilder brand assets constitutes a violation of copyright law
and may result in legal action. EvolvBits actively enforces its intellectual property rights.

---
